holdings.infoBox: OSCV is an equity ETF with a total of 65 individual holdings. The top holdings are nVent Electric stock at 2.94%, The Hanover Insurance Group at 2.73%, Viper Energy at 2.68%, Arcosa at 2.65%, and Hawkins at 2.62%.

overview.description: The Opus Small Cap Value ETF (OSCV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively managed fund that selects US small-cap companies and REITs based on valuation plus quality and growth metrics. The fund seeks capital appreciation. OSCV was launched on Jul 18, 2018 and is issued by Opus Capital Management.
